holdings.infoBox: OKLL is an equity ETF with a total of 12 individual holdings. The top holdings are US DOLLARS stock at 55.67%, OKLO INC SWAP CS-L at 35.66%, OKLO INC SWAP CANTOR at 34.60%, OKLO INC SWAP JNST-L at 33.16%, and OKLO INC SWAP NOMURA at 29.61%.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2x Long OKLO ETF (OKLL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in utilities equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of Oklo Inc. Class A (NYSE: OKLO), less fees and expenses, through derivatives such as swap agreements. OKLL was launched on Jun 23, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.
